narrative:
Buckeye Local Sd (Ashtabula) school district has 7,133 registered voters, with 56.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.6%, a modest Republican lean of 2.1 percentage points.
